item.name: Tales of Adventure: One Summoner's Journey I
item.description:
A detailed record of one adventurer's path to becoming a realm-renowned summoner─so detailed, in fact, that all who read it come to swear they experienced the events firsthand.

Use to instantly level summoner to 60 and complete all job quests up through “A Flare for the Dramatic.” Cannot be used outside large settlements. Automatic logout will commence upon usage.
